module_designs_complete.evidence: 6 module designs: M1 (Reviewer), M2 (Updater), M3 (IMPLEMENTATION_ROUTING), M4 (Writer awareness), M5 (Phase 16/08 scope), M6 (Edge cases)

all_modules_have_clear_responsibilities.evidence: Each module has a single clear purpose with defined inputs, outputs, and interfaces

error_taxonomy_complete.evidence: 24 error codes across 6 categories (IMPL-1xx through IMPL-6xx)

designs_cover_all_requirements.evidence: 34/34 ACs covered. 7/7 FRs covered. 4/4 NFRs covered. See AC coverage matrices in each module design.

interface_contracts_defined.evidence: REVIEW_CONTEXT, UPDATE_CONTEXT, WRITER_CONTEXT schemas defined. Reviewer output format defined. Update report format defined. Per-file-loop-summary format defined.

backward_compatibility_verified.evidence: M6 Section 5: 6-row backward compatibility matrix. debate_mode=false path unchanged. Existing 264 debate tests unaffected.

details.article_I: Designs implement architecture specifications exactly (IMPLEMENTATION_ROUTING, per-file loop, agent structure all match architecture-overview.md)
details.article_IV: All design decisions documented explicitly. No ambiguities remain. Error handling for every edge case documented.
details.article_V: Simplest solution: 2 new agent files, prompt-level changes to 4 existing files. No new runtime code, hooks, or dependencies. Single-row routing table.
details.article_VII: Every design element traces to specific ACs. 34/34 ACs have explicit module/section references.
details.article_IX: All required design artifacts exist and validated. GATE-04 checklist complete.
